title: [MTR4] Low Effort Eidan 7000
description: Low Effort Tokyo Metro 'Eidan' 7000 for MTR mod!
body:
# Low Effort Eidan 7000
![Banner image for LERT Eidan 7000, featuring the 2 window variants and liveries available in the resource pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3dbcf3c39ddb915363f8136f5d7a613a6bdc28b.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/N6fC1Ah2SZI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
This resource pack adds the Tokyo Metro 7000 series (Eidan 7000) for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, with it being a remodelled version of the Eidan 9000 from the base MTR mod.

## Variants
- Original yellow livery
  - Big windows
    - Chopper Control motor
    - Hitachi VVVF motor
    - Mitsubishi VVVF motor
  - Small windows
    - Chopper Control motor
    - Hitachi VVVF motor
    - Mitsubishi VVVF motor
- New brown, yellow & white livery
  - Big windows
    - Chopper Control motor
    - Hitachi VVVF motor
    - Mitsubishi VVVF motor
  - Small windows
    - Chopper Control motor
    - Hitachi VVVF motor
    - Mitsubishi VVVF motor
